<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>⚡ Live Loot Deals Tracker</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
</head>
<body class="bg-gray-50 font-sans">

    <header class="bg-gradient-to-r from-red-600 to-orange-500 text-white text-center py-8 shadow-lg">
        <h1 class="text-4xl font-extrabold tracking-tight">Today's Biggest Price Drops!</h1>
        <p class="text-sm mt-2 opacity-90">100% Automated Real-Time Deals</p>
    </header>

    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 py-10">
        <div id="deals-container" class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
            <!-- ડેટા લોડિંગ સ્ટેટ -->
            <p class="text-center text-gray-500 col-span-full">Loading latest deals...</p>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        // તમારી ગૂગલ શીટને "Publish to Web" કરીને તેની CSV લિંક અહિયાં નાખવી
        const CSV_URL = "YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_PUBLISHED_CSV_URL_HAVE";

        async function fetchDeals() {
            try {
                const response = await fetch(CSV_URL);
                const data = await response.text();
                const rows = data.split("\n").slice(1); // હેડર રો કાઢી નાખવા
                
                const container = document.getElementById("deals-container");
                container.innerHTML = ""; // લોડિંગ મેસેજ ક્લિયર કરવો

                rows.forEach(row => {
                    const columns = row.split(",");
                    if(columns.length >= 7) {
                        const [id, title, img, oldPrice, newPrice, discount, link] = columns;
                        
                        // જો ખરેખર ડિસ્કાઉન્ટ હોય તો જ કાર્ડ બતાવવું
                        if(parseInt(newPrice) < parseInt(oldPrice)) {
                            const cardHTML = `
                                <div class="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-md overflow-hidden hover:shadow-2xl transition duration-300 flex flex-col justify-between p-4 border border-gray-100">
                                    <div>
                                        <div class="relative">
                                            <img src="${img}" class="w-full h-44 object-contain mb-3" alt="Product">
                                            <span class="absolute top-0 left-0 bg-red-500 text-white text-xs font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded-md">${discount} OFF</span>
                                        </div>
                                        <h2 class="text-gray-800 font-semibold text-sm line-clamp-2">${title}</h2>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="mt-4">
                                        <div class="flex items-baseline gap-2">
                                            <span class="text-2xl font-black text-gray-900">₹${newPrice.trim()}</span>
                                            <span class="text-sm text-gray-400 line-through">₹${oldPrice.trim()}</span>
                                        </div>
                                        <a href="${link.trim()}" target="_blank" class="w-full block text-center bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-600 text-white font-bold py-2.5 px-4 rounded-lg mt-3 transition">
                                            Grab This Deal
                                        </a>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            `;
                            container.innerHTML += cardHTML;
                        }
                    }
                });
            } catch (error) {
                console.error("Error loading CSV:", error);
            }
        }
        window.onload = fetchDeals;
    </script>
</body>
</html>
